title: Introducing Gemini 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber
summary: Google introduces new Gemini models: 3.6 Flash, 3.5 Flash-Lite, and 3.5 Flash Cyber. These updates expand the Gemini family with varying performance and cost profiles, likely targeting different deployment scenarios from lightweight to specialized cyber applications.
